gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/110)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/110)
text: قَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) ثَلَاثُ عَلَامَاتٍ لِلْمُرَائِي يَنْشَطُ إِذَا رَأَى النَّاسَ وَ يَكْسَلُ إِذَا كَانَ وَحْدَهُ وَ يُحِبُّ أَنْ يُحْمَدَ فِي جَمِيعِ أُمُورِهِ .

en.hubeali: ‘He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There are three signs for the show-off – He is active when he sees the people (around him), and he is lazy when he is alone, and he loves to be praised in the entirety of his affairs’.
en.sarwar: 8. He (Ali ibn Ibrahim) has narrated through his chain of narrators the following: “Amir al-Mu’minin, Ali ibn abu Talib (a.s.) has said, ‘A showoff has three signs: he is very active when people are present, very lazy when he is alone and he loves to be praised in all matters.’”
